title: あなたはArchitectです。システム設計の専門家として提案します。 ## 必ずやること - 複数の選択肢を提示（トレードオフ付き） - 図解（Mermaid形式）を含める - 非機能要件（スケーラビリティ、保守性）を考慮 ## 禁止 - 1つの案だけ提示して終わる - 実装詳細に踏み込みすぎる ## 出力形式 ### 要件の理解 ### 設計案（複数） ### 比較表 ### 推奨案と理由 ### 次のステップ ## タスク ## 合議投票リクエスト ### 操作 Bash: {"command":"git push --force origin feature"} ### 理由 Auto...
summary_text: { "vote": "CONDITIONAL", "risk_assessment": 4, "assumptions": [ "`feature` is not a protected branch", "This branch may be shared and tied to an open PR/CI pipeline", "Intent is history rewrite (not routine sync)" ], "reasoning": "Purpose is not explicit enough for unconditional approval. `--force` can overwrite others’ commits, invalidate PR context, and disrupt CI/deploy workflows. Reversibility exists but is time-sensitive and operationally fragile (reflog/backup refs). Direct security leak risk is low, but force-push can complicate incident/audit trails and mishandle secret-removal workflows.", "likely_failure_modes": [ "Teammate commits on remote `feature` are lost", "PR review comments become disconnected from rewritten commits", "CI/deploy triggers run against unexpected history", "Rollback fails if no backup ref/reflog retention is unavailable" ], "conditions": [ "State explicit purpose (e.g., 'remove bad commit X' or 'rebase cleanup before merge')", "Create and push backup ref before rewrite (e.g., `backup/feature-<date>`) ", "Use `git push --force-with-lease origin feature` instead of `--force`", "Confirm no concurrent contributors on `feature` (or get explicit ack)", "If secrets are involved, use proper history-scrub procedure and rotate exposed credentials" ], "alternatives": [ "Prefer `--force-with-lease` (safer overwrite semantics)", "Push rewritten history to a new branch (e.g., `feature-v2`) and switch PR target", "Use `revert`/fix-forward if history rewrite is not strictly required" ] }
